run_type: with_skill only (baseline comparison deferred to iteration 2)

docs-pr-check-eval-1.notes: Failures caused by miscalibrated expected_output. Docs for #4905 already exist in repo (merged PR). Skill performed correctly — classified as 'Docs present' with correct file link.

docs-pr-check-eval-2.notes: Clean pass. Both dependency bumps correctly classified as 'No docs required'.

docs-pr-check-eval-3.notes: Assertion failures due to over-specified expected classifications. #6103 classified as 'Docs update needed' (more accurate than the eval's expected 'Docs needed'). #5962 classified as 'Docs present' with verification note (defensible). Gap summary quality was high.

docs-pr-check-eval-4.prompt: Phase 1.5 for Tempo 3.0 — classify and produce Phase 1.75 handoff
docs-pr-check-eval-4.notes: Best docs-pr-check result. Workflow framing improved output structure. One failure: #6103 classified as 'Docs present' (same PR was 'Docs update needed' in eval 3 — inconsistency between runs is a real finding). Phase 1.75 handoff table was clear and usable.

docs-pr-write-eval-1.prompt: PR #5962 Accept header not in API docs — update them
docs-pr-write-eval-1.notes: Header constant verified against code (vnd.grafana.llm vs llm). Existing page structure preserved. Missing: curl/HTTP request example — skill instructions say 'Include one concrete example' but agent added a description list instead.

docs-pr-write-eval-2.prompt: PR #6103 integer dedicated columns — add configuration section
docs-pr-write-eval-2.notes: High quality output: CLI workflow, annotated output example, YAML config block, corrected field options. Missing: version callout (vParquet5 requirement not noted). This is flagged in open items but not acted on — skill instructions need to be stronger on version requirements.

integration-eval-1.notes: Both failures are miscalibrated assertions (assumed #6103 would need Phase 1.75 work). Integration behavior was exemplary: automatic handoff, correct PR filtering, clear phase labels, open items surfaced.

genuine_skill_issues.issue: Inconsistent classification of PR #6103 across runs
genuine_skill_issues.detail: Eval 3 classified #6103 as 'Docs update needed'; eval 4 classified same PR as 'Docs present'. The docs had been updated between runs (by docs-pr-write eval 2), which explains the discrepancy — but the gap detection in eval 3 was also partially correct before the write ran.
genuine_skill_issues.recommendation: Add a note to docs-pr-check skill: when existing docs partially cover a feature, default to 'Docs update needed' rather than 'Docs present' if any gap is found.

genuine_skill_issues.issue: No curl/HTTP example produced for API endpoint documentation
genuine_skill_issues.detail: docs-pr-write eval 1 added a description of the Accept header but not a runnable example. Skill says 'Include one concrete example' but doesn't specify the format for API endpoints.
genuine_skill_issues.recommendation: Add guidance to docs-pr-write: for API endpoint changes, the example must be a curl command or HTTP request snippet, not a prose description.

genuine_skill_issues.issue: Version requirement not noted in new content
genuine_skill_issues.detail: docs-pr-write eval 2 documented integer dedicated columns without noting the vParquet5 requirement. The open items section flagged it but the agent didn't act on it.
genuine_skill_issues.recommendation: Strengthen the 'Call out defaults and version requirements when relevant' instruction — make it a required step (not optional) for any feature tied to a storage format version.

eval_calibration_issues: eval 1: expected 'Docs needed' for a merged PR whose docs are already in the repo
eval 3: expected 'Docs needed' for #6103 (more correctly 'Docs update needed')
eval 3: expected 'Docs update needed' for #5962 (agent's 'Docs present + verification' is defensible)
eval 4: expected 'Docs needed' for #6103 (same as eval 3)
integration-eval-1: expected files changed for #6103 (correctly docs-present, no write needed)
integration-eval-1: expected PR-to-doc mapping for #6103 (same reason)

eval_fixes: Update eval 1 expected_output: #4905 is 'Docs present', assert a link to construct-traceql-queries.md is provided
Update evals 3 and 4 expected_output for #6103: accept 'Docs update needed' OR 'Docs present' with reasoning
Update integration-eval-1: assert only PRs that need work appear in Phase 1.75 mapping (not specific PR numbers)
skill_fixes: docs-pr-check: clarify 'Docs present' vs 'Docs update needed' decision boundary — any gap = update needed
docs-pr-write: add explicit curl example requirement for API endpoint documentation
docs-pr-write: make version callout a required step for storage-format-dependent features
iteration_2: Run without_skill baseline on evals 2, 3, 4 to measure the delta the skill adds
Re-run evals 1, 3, 4 after updating expected_outputs and skill instructions
Add docs-pr-write workflow evals (3 and 4) to verify Phase 1.75 handoff input handling
